word.definition: Umami refers to the taste sensation that is produced by several amino acids and nucleotides and that has a rich or meaty flavor characteristic of cheese, cooked meat, mushrooms, soy, and ripe tomatoes.

sports_fact.text: Walter Payton missed one game in 13 NFL seasons — as a rookie — and was furious about it for years.

market.headline: Stock Market Today: Nasdaq Rises, Signaling End to Tech Rout
market.summary: Comcast jumps on plan to split in two, oil ticks up

quote.text: Every nation is selfish and every nation considers its selfishness sacred.
quote.author: Antoine de Saint-Exupéry

history.text: Space Shuttle program: STS-71 Mission (Atlantis) docks with the Russian space station Mir for the first time.
